insights.text: Project structure: src/server.py (Flask main), src/mcp_server/mcp_memory_server_v2.py (MCP tools), src/core/ (business logic), src/api/ (REST endpoints), data/dashboard_v3.html (main UI)
MCP Server runs on port 5000 (Flask) with tools like auto_init_session, update_live_record, log_decision, search_past_solutions, get_browser_errors
Chrome extension (extension/) captures browser errors and sends to Flask server for proactive error detection
Project data stored in data/projects_v2/{project_id}.json with embeddings in {project_id}.embeddings/ folder
Testing MCP activity logging after server restart

Translation layer added to dashboard_vnext.html: LANG detected from navigator.language, TRANSLATIONS object with he/en pairs, t() function for lookups. Applied to: Protocol Compliance rules, ROI labels, System Tree empty state, handoffs label.
Browser Context v2 complete: Project-aware FAB (only on dev domains), AI-initiated highlights with tooltip and fade-out, bidirectional communication working
Browser Context v5 polished: dedupe with unique IDs, cleanup on navigation, FAB 3 states (idle/selecting/active), dashboard shows clean status (element count + last highlight)
Installer has: auto-port detection (tries 5000-5009), health check via /api/health, checks if already running, LaunchAgent (Mac) / Task Scheduler (Windows) for auto-start
Archived duplicate/noisy project records (without working_dir) instead of deleting them, to keep rollback safety while cleaning project switcher data.
Protocol Rule #9: After fixing browser errors, AI must clear error log via POST /api/clear-logs so dashboard Orb returns to green
Flask prints need flush=True to appear immediately in terminal. Without it, output is buffered and may not show.
Committed knowledge format v1.0: fixonce_version + project_id at root level for forward compatibility and clone sync identification
Opening message UX: ההבדל בין 'דוח' ל'סיפור'. במקום bullet points טכניים (משימה, סטטוס, הבא), לספר סיפור קצר: מה עשינו, למה עצרנו, מה רצינו לבדוק, מה התוצאה. זה יוצר תחושת המשכיות אמיתית.

Opening message v2: שלושה שיפורים - (1) 'איפה עצרנו' צריך להיות ספציפי טכנית, לא כללי (2) סטטיסטיקות כמו '40 החלטות' הן קרות - להחליף במשפט אנושי על מה המערכת זוכרת (3) לסיים עם הצעד הבא הספציפי, לא רק 'רוצה שנמשיך?'
הדשבורד הראשי הוא http://localhost:5000/lite (dashboard_lite.html), לא vnext או app
